title: flomosia phlomoides
intro: Flomosia phlomoides, also known as Phlomis, is a flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phlomis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Phlomis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
